creator: kris@FreeBSD.org
text:
Packets input/output from cxgb are not counted:

hydra1# netstat -w 1 -I cxgb0
            input        (cxgb0)           output
   packets  errs      bytes    packets  errs      bytes colls
         0     0          0          0     0   24533712     0
         0     0          0          0     0   24544758     0
         0     0          0          0     0   24557568     0
